hooks.command: jq -c 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("\\.claude/skills/")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Blocked: ~/.claude/skills/ is a symlink into a separate checkout. Edit the skill in the repo working copy (the skills/ directory) instead."}} else empty end'
